headline: Carney 🤑 Snags Con Cuck MP 💦🐔 – Poilievre's Floor FLOPPING 😩📉
text:
Canada's Con Cucks 🐔🍑 on THIN ICE 🥶⛸️ as PM MARK 'MONEYBAGS' CARNEY 💰🤑 snatches another MP defector Michael MA 🕺➡️ LIBERAL TENT 🎪🍆! Ma from Ontario's Markham-Unionville 📍🇨🇦 (freshly flipped his seat by a measly 2K votes 🗳️😬) said 'TIME FOR UNITY 🫂🔥 and DECISIVE DADDY ACTION 💪👨‍💼' – ditching Pierre 'Pierre the Pierced' Poilievre's affordability rants 📢💸 for Carney's 'STEADY PRACTICAL VIBES 🧠🍌' that voters BEGGING for 😩🙏!

Poilievre 😡🐸 firing back: 'Ma LET DOWN his voters 🥺📉 who wanted to OWN the LIBS 🔥 – now he'll ANSWER TO THEM 👻⚖️!' This is the SECOND Con floor-crosser in a MONTH ⏰💥 – Chris d'Entremont from Nova Scotia 🍁🐟 bailed after Carney's fiscal PLAN DROP 💣📊, saying Poilievre NO LONGER REPPIN' him 😤🚫. Cons clapped back with 'PROMISE BREAKER 👋🤥 on PERSONAL GRUDGES 😠'!

Meanwhile, Alberta's Matt Jeneroux 🛢️😢 RESIGNED for 'FAM REASONS 👨‍👩‍👧' – Poilievre's COMBATIVE TRUCKER-STYLE RAGE MODE 🛻😤 blamed for election L 🥴📉! Dude even LOST his Ottawa seat 🏛️💥, so a safe Alberta bro STEPPED DOWN 🙌 to let Pierre PARACHUTE IN 🪂 and WIN 80% EASY 🏆😎!

Carney at Liberal XMAS RAGER 🎄🍾 in Ottawa: DRAGS Ma onstage 🎤🔥, 'JOIN OUR BIG BROAD GROWING TENT 🎪📈 – BETTER CHRISTMAS WITH US SANTA CARNEY 🎅🤑!' Poilievre simping on affordability: 'Ma ENDORSED the FOOD PRICE HIKE POLICIES 🥐📈 he was ELECTED to SLAY 🔪!' Polls? Angus Reid TEA ☕: Poilievre's Con fanbase SHRINKING 68% ➡️ 58% 😱📉 – leadership review LOOMING ⏳😬 like a bad hookup!

Con party CRUMBLING 🧱💥 as Carney's Liberal ORGY 🥳👯‍♂️ swells – Poilievre's combative 'AXE THE TAX' schtick 😤🪓 turning MPs into Liberal GROUPies 💃🍑! Who's next to CROSS THE FLOOR 🕺➡️? Poilievre sweating 😰💦 or ready to TRUCK ON 🛻🚀? CANADA'S PARLIAMENT turning into Liberal LOVE SHACK ❤️🔥‼️
